title: Asia-Pacific markets plunge as oil surges after Trump's speech on Iran war
summary_full: During his speech, Trump reiterated that the U.S. objectives in Iran were almost met and said that "we have all the cards" in the conflict.
summary_public: During his speech, Trump reiterated that the U.S. objectives in Iran were almost met and said that "we have all the cards" in the conflict.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Asia-Pacific markets plunge as oil surges after Trump's speech
